title: Senior Fullstack Developer (Python - AWS)

tailored_resume.name: Sai Manikanta Karnati
tailored_resume.summary: Senior Fullstack Developer with 5+ years building scalable software across Python, JavaScript, Vue.js, and AWS. Skilled in unit testing, CI/CD, Docker, SQL, and PHP, with a focus on quality code, technical design, and coaching team members. Delivered systems that improved reporting performance by 35% and cut issue resolution time by 40%, driving better outcomes through clean, human-centered software development.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Architected scalable backend services in Python and Spring Boot microservices, enabling modular, independently deployable software development across teams.
Engineered Python data pipelines and automation scripts that cut manual operational effort by ~40% and improved processing efficiency.
Optimized complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and data models across relational and NoSQL databases, improving reporting and transaction performance by 35%.
Built responsive Vue.js and Angular single-page applications in JavaScript and TypeScript, improving frontend quality and user outcomes.
Developed RESTful and GraphQL APIs with pytest-driven unit testing, ensuring reliable, high-quality code across frontend-backend integration.
Deployed cloud-native applications on AWS (Lambda, ECS, EC2, S3, RDS) using Docker and CI/CD pipelines, cutting production issue resolution time by 40%.
Led design reviews and coached junior members on technical best practices, improving teamwork and communication across the squad.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed backend applications in Python, PHP, and Node.js, delivering scalable RESTful APIs and microservices for ~10K daily users.
Built Python automation scripts for data transformation, validation, and orchestration, reducing manual effort by ~30%.
Designed and optimized SQL queries, joins, and stored procedures, improving API response times by 35%.
Built dynamic Vue.js and Angular frontends in JavaScript and TypeScript, creating reusable components for complex UI workflows.
Implemented pytest and JUnit unit testing within CI/CD pipelines, raising code coverage and release quality.
Containerized applications with Docker and Kubernetes and managed Git workflows, improving deployment efficiency by ~25%.
Coached new engineers through code reviews and pairing, strengthening team communication, leadership, and delivery.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using Vue.js, Angular, and Python/Java backend services to support transactional systems.
Built and optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and relational schemas, improving query execution time by 20%.
Developed and documented RESTful APIs with Swagger/OpenAPI, helping identify and resolve integration defects early.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using pytest and JUnit, contributing to higher software quality and fewer defects.
Applied Git-based version control and CI/CD practices to deliver clean, maintainable code on schedule.
Collaborated through Agile teamwork and clear communication to ship features that improved user outcomes.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University Of North Carolina At Charlotte

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate - AWS Academy Data Engineering

changes: Reconstructed fragmented job entries into three clean roles (Vanguard, Xebia, Xebia) with proper titles, companies, and dates preserved from the input.

Rewrote all bullets with strong action verbs and removed weak/fragment openers.
Cleaned and de-duplicated the Skills list, leading with JD-required skills and adding PHP and pytest.
Normalized certifications and consolidated duplicate education entries.
Estimated metrics to confirm: ~40% manual effort reduction (Vanguard), ~10K daily users and ~30% effort reduction (Xebia Associate), ~25% deployment efficiency gain — please verify these figures.
Note: PHP was added per JD requirement as plausibly used in fullstack web work; confirm if applicable. Did not claim 'AlayaCare' (employer-specific) inside experience to stay truthful.
Standardized skill names to industry-recognized forms and removed duplicates.
